tasks.title: Entity Detail File Upload/Download Wiring - Wire file upload and download handlers on entity detail pages (Lead Contact Deal). Upload: file picker to upload mutation to Supabase Storage. Download: presigned URL to browser download. Follows IFC-094 (Pattern 1 - infra-only). Resolves WIRE-IFC-094-001.
tasks.description: Entity Detail File Upload/Download Wiring - Wire file upload and download handlers on entity detail pages (Lead Contact Deal). Upload: file picker to upload mutation to Supabase Storage. Download: presigned URL to browser download. Follows IFC-094 (Pattern 1 - infra-only). Resolves WIRE-IFC-094-001.
tasks.summary: Upload/download working on 3 entity detail pages; presigned URLs; file size validation; tenant isolation; tests >=90%

tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Upload/download working on 3 entity detail pages; presigned URLs; file size validation; tenant isolation; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Integrations Dashboard Endpoint Wiring. Wire 5 dead integrations router endpoints: getAllConnectorsHealth, getConnectorHealth, getConnectorsByType, getDashboardConfig, triggerSync. Backend built (IFC-003), zero web callers. Decision: build integrations settings page to consume these. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 61-65.
